title: TFC Lumberjack
body:
## **New system for producing wood lumbers for TFC**

 in this system, you will have to manually process the Stripped Log or wood into beams
 and then use tools to process the beams into sawn timber
 everything is done manually outside the Crafting Table

 mod compatible with Create, Farmer's Delight and Immersive Engineering
 thanks to which mods you will be able to produce boards even more effectively

![tfc lumberjack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/MonWgf7D/images/ea355405c976d2083379247a271bbfd798e4b1b9.png)
